apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: pnkln-orchestrator
  namespace: pnkln-production
  labels:
    app: pnkln
    component: orchestrator
    version: v1
spec:
  replicas: 3
  strategy:
    type: RollingUpdate
    rollingUpdate:
      maxSurge: 1
      maxUnavailable: 0
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: pnkln
      component: orchestrator
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: pnkln
        component: orchestrator
        version: v1
      annotations:
        prometheus.io/scrape: "true"
        prometheus.io/port: "8080"
        prometheus.io/path: "/metrics"
    spec:
      serviceAccountName: pnkln-orchestrator

      # Use Spot VMs for cost optimization
      nodeSelector:
        cloud.google.com/gke-spot: "true"

      # Tolerate preemption
      tolerations:
      - key: cloud.google.com/gke-spot
        operator: Equal
        value: "true"
        effect: NoSchedule

      # Security context
      securityContext:
        runAsNonRoot: true
        runAsUser: 1001
        fsGroup: 1001
        seccompProfile:
          type: RuntimeDefault

      containers:
      - name: orchestrator
        image: us-central1-docker.pkg.dev/PROJECT_ID/pnkln/orchestrator:latest
        imagePullPolicy: Always

        ports:
        - name: http
          containerPort: 8080
          protocol: TCP

        env:
        # From ConfigMap
        - name: CLOUD_ML_REGION
          valueFrom:
            configMapKeyRef:
              name: pnkln-config
              key: CLOUD_ML_REGION

        - name: NODE_ENV
          valueFrom:
            configMapKeyRef:
              name: pnkln-config
              key: NODE_ENV

        - name: LOG_LEVEL
          valueFrom:
            configMapKeyRef:
              name: pnkln-config
              key: LOG_LEVEL

        - name: PORT
          valueFrom:
            configMapKeyRef:
              name: pnkln-config
              key: PORT

        - name: MIN_LTV_CAC_RATIO
          valueFrom:
            configMapKeyRef:
              name: pnkln-config
              key: MIN_LTV_CAC_RATIO

        - name: MIN_ROI_THRESHOLD
          valueFrom:
            configMapKeyRef:
              name: pnkln-config
              key: MIN_ROI_THRESHOLD

        - name: MIN_CONFIDENCE
          valueFrom:
            configMapKeyRef:
              name: pnkln-config
              key: MIN_CONFIDENCE

        # From Secret (created via Secret Manager)
        - name: ANTHROPIC_VERTEX_PROJECT_ID
          valueFrom:
            secretKeyRef:
              name: pnkln-secrets
              key: project-id

        # Resources
        resources:
          requests:
            memory: "2Gi"
            cpu: "1000m"
            ephemeral-storage: "1Gi"
          limits:
            memory: "4Gi"
            cpu: "2000m"
            ephemeral-storage: "2Gi"

        # Liveness probe
        livenessProbe:
          httpGet:
            path: /health
            port: http
          initialDelaySeconds: 30
          periodSeconds: 10
          timeoutSeconds: 5
          successThreshold: 1
          failureThreshold: 3

        # Readiness probe
        readinessProbe:
          httpGet:
            path: /ready
            port: http
          initialDelaySeconds: 5
          periodSeconds: 5
          timeoutSeconds: 3
          successThreshold: 1
          failureThreshold: 2

        # Startup probe (for slow starts)
        startupProbe:
          httpGet:
            path: /health
            port: http
          initialDelaySeconds: 0
          periodSeconds: 10
          timeoutSeconds: 3
          successThreshold: 1
          failureThreshold: 30

        # Security context
        securityContext:
          allowPrivilegeEscalation: false
          readOnlyRootFilesystem: true
          runAsNonRoot: true
          runAsUser: 1001
          capabilities:
            drop:
            - ALL

        # Volume mounts
        volumeMounts:
        - name: tmp
          mountPath: /tmp
        - name: cache
          mountPath: /app/.cache

      volumes:
      - name: tmp
        emptyDir: {}
      - name: cache
        emptyDir: {}

apiVersion: networking.k8s.io/v1
kind: Ingress
metadata:
  name: pnkln-orchestrator
  namespace: pnkln-production
  labels:
    app: pnkln
    component: orchestrator
  annotations:
    # Use GCE ingress controller
    kubernetes.io/ingress.class: "gce"

    # SSL redirect
    kubernetes.io/ingress.allow-http: "false"

    # Global static IP (create separately)
    kubernetes.io/ingress.global-static-ip-name: "pnkln-orchestrator-ip"

    # Managed certificate (GCP)
    networking.gke.io/managed-certificates: "pnkln-cert"

    # Backend config
    cloud.google.com/backend-config: '{"default": "pnkln-backend-config"}'

    # NEG (Network Endpoint Groups)
    cloud.google.com/neg: '{"ingress": true}'
spec:
  rules:
  - host: api.pnkln.io
    http:
      paths:
      - path: /*
        pathType: ImplementationSpecific
        backend:
          service:
            name: pnkln-orchestrator
            port:
              number: 80

apiVersion: autoscaling/v2
kind: HorizontalPodAutoscaler
metadata:
  name: pnkln-orchestrator
  namespace: pnkln-production
  labels:
    app: pnkln
    component: orchestrator
spec:
  scaleTargetRef:
    apiVersion: apps/v1
    kind: Deployment
    name: pnkln-orchestrator

  minReplicas: 3
  maxReplicas: 50

  metrics:
  # CPU-based scaling
  - type: Resource
    resource:
      name: cpu
      target:
        type: Utilization
        averageUtilization: 70

  # Memory-based scaling
  - type: Resource
    resource:
      name: memory
      target:
        type: Utilization
        averageUtilization: 80

  # Custom metric: requests per second
  # Requires metrics server and custom metrics API
  - type: Pods
    pods:
      metric:
        name: http_requests_per_second
      target:
        type: AverageValue
        averageValue: "100"

  behavior:
    scaleDown:
      stabilizationWindowSeconds: 300
      policies:
      - type: Percent
        value: 50
        periodSeconds: 60
      - type: Pods
        value: 2
        periodSeconds: 60
      selectPolicy: Min

    scaleUp:
      stabilizationWindowSeconds: 0
      policies:
      - type: Percent
        value: 100
        periodSeconds: 30
      - type: Pods
        value: 5
        periodSeconds: 30
      selectPolicy: Max

apiVersion: cloud.google.com/v1
kind: BackendConfig
metadata:
  name: pnkln-backend-config
  namespace: pnkln-production
spec:
  # Health check configuration
  healthCheck:
    checkIntervalSec: 10
    timeoutSec: 5
    healthyThreshold: 2
    unhealthyThreshold: 3
    type: HTTP
    requestPath: /health
    port: 8080

  # Connection draining
  connectionDraining:
    drainingTimeoutSec: 60

  # Session affinity
  sessionAffinity:
    affinityType: "NONE"

  # Timeout
  timeoutSec: 30

  # Security policy
  securityPolicy:
    name: "pnkln-security-policy"

  # Cloud CDN (if needed)
  cdn:
    enabled: false
    cachePolicy:
      includeHost: true
      includeProtocol: true
      includeQueryString: false

  # IAP (Identity-Aware Proxy) - optional
  iap:
    enabled: false
    oauthclientCredentials:
      secretName: pnkln-iap-secret

# Cloud Build configuration for pnkln orchestrator
# Triggers on: push to main, tag creation, PR

steps:
  # ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
  # STEP 1: Install dependencies and run tests
  # ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
  - name: 'node:20-alpine'
    id: 'test'
    entrypoint: 'sh'
    args:
      - '-c'
      - |
        echo "📦 Installing dependencies..."
        npm ci
        echo "🧪 Running tests..."
        npm test || true
        echo "✅ Tests complete"

  # ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
  # STEP 2: Build Docker image
  # ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
  - name: 'gcr.io/cloud-builders/docker'
    id: 'build'
    args:
      - 'build'
      - '-t'
      - 'us-central1-docker.pkg.dev/$PROJECT_ID/pnkln/orchestrator:$SHORT_SHA'
      - '-t'
      - 'us-central1-docker.pkg.dev/$PROJECT_ID/pnkln/orchestrator:$BRANCH_NAME'
      - '-t'
      - 'us-central1-docker.pkg.dev/$PROJECT_ID/pnkln/orchestrator:latest'
      - '--cache-from'
      - 'us-central1-docker.pkg.dev/$PROJECT_ID/pnkln/orchestrator:latest'
      - '.'

  # ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
  # STEP 3: Scan image for vulnerabilities
  # ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
  - name: 'gcr.io/cloud-builders/gcloud'
    id: 'scan'
    args:
      - 'container'
      - 'images'
      - 'scan'
      - 'us-central1-docker.pkg.dev/$PROJECT_ID/pnkln/orchestrator:$SHORT_SHA'
    waitFor: ['build']

  # ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
  # STEP 4: Push to Artifact Registry
  # ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
  - name: 'gcr.io/cloud-builders/docker'
    id: 'push'
    args:
      - 'push'
      - '--all-tags'
      - 'us-central1-docker.pkg.dev/$PROJECT_ID/pnkln/orchestrator'
    waitFor: ['scan']

  # ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
  # STEP 5: Deploy to GKE (production only)
  # ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
  - name: 'gcr.io/cloud-builders/gke-deploy'
    id: 'deploy'
    args:
      - 'run'
      - '--filename=k8s/base'
      - '--location=us-central1'
      - '--cluster=pnkln-production'
      - '--namespace=pnkln-production'
      - '--image=us-central1-docker.pkg.dev/$PROJECT_ID/pnkln/orchestrator:$SHORT_SHA'
    waitFor: ['push']

  # ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
  # STEP 6: Wait for rollout to complete
  # ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
  - name: 'gcr.io/cloud-builders/kubectl'
    id: 'verify'
    args:
      - 'rollout'
      - 'status'
      - 'deployment/pnkln-orchestrator'
      - '-n'
      - 'pnkln-production'
    env:
      - 'CLOUDSDK_COMPUTE_REGION=us-central1'
      - 'CLOUDSDK_CONTAINER_CLUSTER=pnkln-production'
    waitFor: ['deploy']

  # ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
  # STEP 7: Run smoke tests
  # ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
  - name: 'gcr.io/cloud-builders/curl'
    id: 'smoke-test'
    args:
      - '-f'
      - 'http://pnkln-orchestrator.pnkln-production.svc.cluster.local/health'
    waitFor: ['verify']

# Build configuration
options:
  machineType: 'E2_HIGHCPU_8'
  logging: CLOUD_LOGGING_ONLY
  diskSizeGb: 100

  # Build in Docker-in-Docker
  env:
    - 'DOCKER_BUILDKIT=1'

timeout: '1200s' # 20 minutes

# Build tags
tags:
  - 'pnkln'
  - 'orchestrator'
  - '$BRANCH_NAME'

# Images to push to Artifact Registry
images:
  - 'us-central1-docker.pkg.dev/$PROJECT_ID/pnkln/orchestrator:$SHORT_SHA'
  - 'us-central1-docker.pkg.dev/$PROJECT_ID/pnkln/orchestrator:$BRANCH_NAME'
  - 'us-central1-docker.pkg.dev/$PROJECT_ID/pnkln/orchestrator:latest'

# Artifact storage
artifacts:
  objects:
    location: 'gs://$PROJECT_ID-build-artifacts/pnkln/$BUILD_ID'
    paths:
      - 'dist/**/*'

apiVersion: networking.k8s.io/v1
kind: NetworkPolicy
metadata:
  name: pnkln-orchestrator
  namespace: pnkln-production
  labels:
    app: pnkln
    component: orchestrator
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: pnkln
      component: orchestrator

  policyTypes:
  - Ingress
  - Egress

  # Ingress rules
  ingress:
  # Allow from ingress controller
  - from:
    - namespaceSelector:
        matchLabels:
          name: ingress-nginx
    ports:
    - protocol: TCP
      port: 8080

  # Allow from Prometheus (monitoring)
  - from:
    - namespaceSelector:
        matchLabels:
          name: monitoring
    ports:
    - protocol: TCP
      port: 8080

  # Egress rules
  egress:
  # Allow DNS
  - to:
    - namespaceSelector:
        matchLabels:
          name: kube-system
    ports:
    - protocol: UDP
      port: 53

  # Allow HTTPS to Vertex AI and GCP services
  - to:
    - podSelector: {}
    ports:
    - protocol: TCP
      port: 443

  # Allow HTTP (for Vertex AI endpoints)
  - to:
    - podSelector: {}
    ports:
    - protocol: TCP
      port: 80

# Skaffold configuration for pnkln orchestrator
# Enables rapid local development and easy deployment

apiVersion: skaffold/v4beta7
kind: Config

metadata:
  name: pnkln-orchestrator

# ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
# BUILD CONFIGURATION
# ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
build:
  artifacts:
    - image: pnkln-orchestrator
      docker:
        dockerfile: Dockerfile
        buildArgs:
          NODE_ENV: "{{.NODE_ENV}}"

  # Use local Docker for dev, GCR for production
  local:
    push: false
    useBuildkit: true

# ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
# DEPLOY CONFIGURATION
# ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
manifests:
  kustomize:
    paths:
      - k8s/base

deploy:
  kubectl: {}

# ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
# PORT FORWARDING (for local access)
# ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
portForward:
  - resourceType: service
    resourceName: pnkln-orchestrator
    namespace: pnkln-production
    port: 80
    localPort: 8080

# ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
# FILE SYNC (hot reload for development)
# ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
sync:
  manual:
    - src: "src/**/*.ts"
      dest: /app/src

# ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
# PROFILES (different configurations for different environments)
# ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
profiles:
  # Development profile (local)
  - name: dev
    activation:
      - command: dev
    build:
      local:
        push: false
    patches:
      - op: replace
        path: /build/artifacts/0/docker/buildArgs/NODE_ENV
        value: development

  # Production profile (GKE)
  - name: production
    activation:
      - command: run
    build:
      googleCloudBuild:
        projectId: YOUR_PROJECT_ID
        diskSizeGb: 100
        machineType: E2_HIGHCPU_8
      artifacts:
        - image: us-central1-docker.pkg.dev/YOUR_PROJECT_ID/pnkln/orchestrator
          docker:
            dockerfile: Dockerfile
            buildArgs:
              NODE_ENV: production
    patches:
      - op: replace
        path: /build/artifacts/0/docker/buildArgs/NODE_ENV
        value: production

file.content:
# YouAi Governance Service - Production Dockerfile
FROM python:3.11-slim

# Set environment variables
ENV PYTHONUNBUFFERED=1 \
    PYTHONDONTWRITEBYTECODE=1 \
    PIP_NO_CACHE_DIR=1 \
    PIP_DISABLE_PIP_VERSION_CHECK=1

# Create app user
RUN useradd -m -u 1000 youai && \
    mkdir -p /app && \
    chown -R youai:youai /app

WORKDIR /app

# Install system dependencies
RUN apt-get update && \
    apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends \
    gcc \
    libpq-dev \
    && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

# Copy requirements first for better caching
COPY --chown=youai:youai requirements.txt .

# Install Python dependencies
RUN pip install --no-cache-dir -r requirements.txt

# Copy application code
COPY --chown=youai:youai app/ ./app/
COPY --chown=youai:youai .env.example .env

# Switch to non-root user
USER youai

# Expose port
EXPOSE 8000

# Health check
HEALTHCHECK --interval=30s --timeout=10s --start-period=5s --retries=3 \
    CMD python -c "import requests; requests.get('http://localhost:8000/health')" || exit 1

# Run the application
CMD ["uvicorn", "app.main:app", "--host", "0.0.0.0", "--port", "8000"]

Now I have a comprehensive understanding of the existing infrastructure. Let me provide a complete integration plan for the Rust Pingora media-edge service.

---

## Rust Pingora Media-Edge Service: GKE Integration Plan

### Executive Summary

This plan outlines seamless integration of a Rust-based Pingora media proxy service into the existing GKE Autopilot infrastructure, leveraging the established patterns from the `pnkln-orchestrator` deployment while introducing Rust-specific optimizations.

---

## 1. Docker Build Strategy (Multi-Stage for Rust)

### Recommended Dockerfile: `media-edge/Dockerfile`

```dockerfile
# ============================================
# STAGE 1: Build Environment (Chef Pattern)
# ============================================
FROM rust:1.75-slim-bookworm AS chef
RUN cargo install cargo-chef
WORKDIR /app

# ============================================
# STAGE 2: Dependency Planning
# ============================================
FROM chef AS planner
COPY . .
RUN cargo chef prepare --recipe-path recipe.json

# ============================================
# STAGE 3: Dependency Building (Cached)
# ============================================
FROM chef AS builder

# Install build dependencies
RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y \
    pkg-config \
    libssl-dev \
    cmake \
    && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

# Copy dependency recipe and build deps only
COPY --from=planner /app/recipe.json recipe.json
RUN cargo chef cook --release --recipe-path recipe.json

# Build application
COPY . .
RUN cargo build --release --bin media-edge

# ============================================
# STAGE 4: Runtime (Minimal)
# ============================================
FROM gcr.io/distroless/cc-debian12:nonroot AS runtime

WORKDIR /app

# Copy binary from builder
COPY --from=builder /app/target/release/media-edge /app/media-edge

# Copy configuration
COPY --from=builder /app/config /app/config

# Security: Run as non-root (UID 1001 matches existing deployment)
USER 1001:1001

EXPOSE 8080

ENTRYPOINT ["/app/media-edge"]
```

### Key Design Decisions:

1. **cargo-chef pattern**: Enables Docker layer caching for Rust dependencies (typical builds drop from 10+ minutes to 1-2 minutes on cache hit)
2. **distroless base**: Minimal attack surface, consistent with GKE security best practices
3. **UID 1001**: Matches existing `pnkln-orchestrator` security context for consistency
4. **Static linking considerations**: For true static binary, consider `x86_64-unknown-linux-musl` target

---

## 2. Kustomize Structure

### Proposed Directory Layout:

```
k8s/
  base/                          # Existing orchestrator base
    kustomization.yaml
    deployment.yaml
    ...
  media-edge/                    # NEW: Media-edge base
    kustomization.yaml
    deployment.yaml
    service.yaml
    backendconfig.yaml
    hpa.yaml
    configmap.yaml
    serviceaccount.yaml
    pdb.yaml
    networkpolicy.yaml
  overlays/                      # NEW: Environment overlays
    dev/
      kustomization.yaml
    staging/
      kustomization.yaml
    production/
      kustomization.yaml
      ingress-patch.yaml         # Adds /media/* path to shared ingress
```

### File: `k8s/media-edge/kustomization.yaml`

```yaml
apiVersion: kustomize.config.k8s.io/v1beta1
kind: Kustomization

namespace: pnkln-production

resources:
  - serviceaccount.yaml
  - configmap.yaml
  - deployment.yaml
  - service.yaml
  - hpa.yaml
  - pdb.yaml
  - networkpolicy.yaml
  - backendconfig.yaml

commonLabels:
  app: pnkln
  component: media-edge
  managed-by: kustomize

images:
  - name: us-central1-docker.pkg.dev/PROJECT_ID/pnkln/media-edge
    newTag: latest
```

### File: `k8s/overlays/production/kustomization.yaml`

```yaml
apiVersion: kustomize.config.k8s.io/v1beta1
kind: Kustomization

namespace: pnkln-production

resources:
  - ../../base              # Existing orchestrator
  - ../../media-edge        # New media-edge service

patches:
  - path: ingress-patch.yaml
    target:
      kind: Ingress
      name: pnkln-orchestrator

images:
  - name: us-central1-docker.pkg.dev/PROJECT_ID/pnkln/orchestrator
    newTag: ${ORCHESTRATOR_TAG}
  - name: us-central1-docker.pkg.dev/PROJECT_ID/pnkln/media-edge
    newTag: ${MEDIA_EDGE_TAG}
```

---

## 3. Complete K8s Manifest Files

### File: `k8s/media-edge/deployment.yaml`

```yaml
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: media-edge
  namespace: pnkln-production
  labels:
    app: pnkln
    component: media-edge
    version: v1
spec:
  replicas: 3
  strategy:
    type: RollingUpdate
    rollingUpdate:
      maxSurge: 1
      maxUnavailable: 0
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: pnkln
      component: media-edge
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: pnkln
        component: media-edge
        version: v1
      annotations:
        prometheus.io/scrape: "true"
        prometheus.io/port: "9090"
        prometheus.io/path: "/metrics"
    spec:
      serviceAccountName: media-edge

      # Use Spot VMs (matches existing pattern)
      nodeSelector:
        cloud.google.com/gke-spot: "true"

      tolerations:
        - key: cloud.google.com/gke-spot
          operator: Equal
          value: "true"
          effect: NoSchedule

      # Security context (matches existing)
      securityContext:
        runAsNonRoot: true
        runAsUser: 1001
        fsGroup: 1001
        seccompProfile:
          type: RuntimeDefault

      containers:
        - name: media-edge
          image: us-central1-docker.pkg.dev/PROJECT_ID/pnkln/media-edge:latest
          imagePullPolicy: Always

          ports:
            - name: http
              containerPort: 8080
              protocol: TCP
            - name: metrics
              containerPort: 9090
              protocol: TCP

          env:
            - name: RUST_LOG
              valueFrom:
                configMapKeyRef:
                  name: media-edge-config
                  key: RUST_LOG

            - name: CACHE_SIZE_MB
              valueFrom:
                configMapKeyRef:
                  name: media-edge-config
                  key: CACHE_SIZE_MB

            - name: UPSTREAM_TIMEOUT_MS
              valueFrom:
                configMapKeyRef:
                  name: media-edge-config
                  key: UPSTREAM_TIMEOUT_MS

            - name: GCS_BUCKET
              valueFrom:
                configMapKeyRef:
                  name: media-edge-config
                  key: GCS_BUCKET

          resources:
            requests:
              memory: "512Mi"
              cpu: "500m"
              ephemeral-storage: "2Gi"  # For local cache
            limits:
              memory: "2Gi"
              cpu: "2000m"
              ephemeral-storage: "10Gi"

          # GCP LB compatible health checks
          livenessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /health/live
              port: http
            initialDelaySeconds: 5
            periodSeconds: 10
            timeoutSeconds: 5
            successThreshold: 1
            failureThreshold: 3

          readinessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /health/ready
              port: http
            initialDelaySeconds: 3
            periodSeconds: 5
            timeoutSeconds: 3
            successThreshold: 1
            failureThreshold: 2

          startupProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /health/live
              port: http
            initialDelaySeconds: 0
            periodSeconds: 2
            timeoutSeconds: 2
            successThreshold: 1
            failureThreshold: 15  # 30s max startup

          securityContext:
            allowPrivilegeEscalation: false
            readOnlyRootFilesystem: true
            runAsNonRoot: true
            runAsUser: 1001
            capabilities:
              drop:
                - ALL

          volumeMounts:
            - name: cache
              mountPath: /app/cache

      volumes:
        - name: cache
          emptyDir:
            sizeLimit: 10Gi
```

### File: `k8s/media-edge/service.yaml`

```yaml
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: media-edge
  namespace: pnkln-production
  labels:
    app: pnkln
    component: media-edge
  annotations:
    cloud.google.com/neg: '{"ingress": true}'
    cloud.google.com/backend-config: '{"default": "media-edge-backend-config"}'
spec:
  type: ClusterIP
  selector:
    app: pnkln
    component: media-edge
  ports:
    - port: 80
      targetPort: http
      protocol: TCP
      name: http
    - port: 9090
      targetPort: metrics
      protocol: TCP
      name: metrics
  sessionAffinity: None
```

### File: `k8s/media-edge/backendconfig.yaml`

```yaml
apiVersion: cloud.google.com/v1
kind: BackendConfig
metadata:
  name: media-edge-backend-config
  namespace: pnkln-production
spec:
  # Health check for GCP Load Balancer
  healthCheck:
    checkIntervalSec: 5
    timeoutSec: 3
    healthyThreshold: 2
    unhealthyThreshold: 3
    type: HTTP
    requestPath: /health/ready
    port: 8080

  # Connection draining (longer for media streaming)
  connectionDraining:
    drainingTimeoutSec: 120

  sessionAffinity:
    affinityType: "NONE"

  # Extended timeout for large media files
  timeoutSec: 300

  # Security policy (reuse existing)
  securityPolicy:
    name: "pnkln-security-policy"

  # Cloud CDN enabled for media caching
  cdn:
    enabled: true
    cachePolicy:
      includeHost: true
      includeProtocol: true
      includeQueryString: true  # Cache varies by query params
    cacheMode: CACHE_ALL_STATIC
    defaultTtl: 3600           # 1 hour default
    maxTtl: 86400              # 24 hour max
    clientTtl: 3600
    negativeCaching: true
    signedUrlCacheMaxAgeSec: 7200
```

### File: `k8s/media-edge/hpa.yaml`

```yaml
apiVersion: autoscaling/v2
kind: HorizontalPodAutoscaler
metadata:
  name: media-edge
  namespace: pnkln-production
  labels:
    app: pnkln
    component: media-edge
spec:
  scaleTargetRef:
    apiVersion: apps/v1
    kind: Deployment
    name: media-edge

  minReplicas: 3
  maxReplicas: 50

  metrics:
    # CPU-based scaling
    - type: Resource
      resource:
        name: cpu
        target:
          type: Utilization
          averageUtilization: 70

    # Memory-based scaling
    - type: Resource
      resource:
        name: memory
        target:
          type: Utilization
          averageUtilization: 75

    # Custom metric: requests per second (via Prometheus adapter)
    - type: Pods
      pods:
        metric:
          name: http_requests_per_second
        target:
          type: AverageValue
          averageValue: "500"  # Higher threshold for proxy workload

    # Custom metric: cache hit ratio (scale up if cache misses increase)
    - type: Pods
      pods:
        metric:
          name: cache_hit_ratio
        target:
          type: AverageValue
          averageValue: "0.8"  # Scale up if below 80% hit rate

  behavior:
    scaleDown:
      stabilizationWindowSeconds: 300
      policies:
        - type: Percent
          value: 25
          periodSeconds: 60
        - type: Pods
          value: 2
          periodSeconds: 60
      selectPolicy: Min

    scaleUp:
      stabilizationWindowSeconds: 0
      policies:
        - type: Percent
          value: 100
          periodSeconds: 15
        - type: Pods
          value: 10
          periodSeconds: 15
      selectPolicy: Max
```

### File: `k8s/media-edge/configmap.yaml`

```yaml
apiVersion: v1
kind: ConfigMap
metadata:
  name: media-edge-config
  namespace: pnkln-production
  labels:
    app: pnkln
    component: media-edge
data:
  # Rust logging
  RUST_LOG: "info,media_edge=debug,pingora=info"

  # Cache configuration
  CACHE_SIZE_MB: "8192"

  # Upstream configuration
  UPSTREAM_TIMEOUT_MS: "30000"

  # GCS configuration
  GCS_BUCKET: "pnkln-media-assets"

  # Pingora configuration
  LISTEN_ADDR: "0.0.0.0:8080"
  METRICS_ADDR: "0.0.0.0:9090"

  # Health check paths
  HEALTH_LIVE_PATH: "/health/live"
  HEALTH_READY_PATH: "/health/ready"
```

### File: `k8s/overlays/production/ingress-patch.yaml`

```yaml
apiVersion: networking.k8s.io/v1
kind: Ingress
metadata:
  name: pnkln-orchestrator
  namespace: pnkln-production
spec:
  rules:
    - host: api.pnkln.io
      http:
        paths:
          # Media paths handled by media-edge
          - path: /media/*
            pathType: ImplementationSpecific
            backend:
              service:
                name: media-edge
                port:
                  number: 80
          # All other paths to orchestrator
          - path: /*
            pathType: ImplementationSpecific
            backend:
              service:
                name: pnkln-orchestrator
                port:
                  number: 80
```

---

## 4. Cloud Build Additions

### File: `cloudbuild.media-edge.yaml` (New dedicated pipeline)

```yaml
# Cloud Build configuration for media-edge Rust service
# Triggers on: push to main with changes in media-edge/

steps:
  # ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
  # STEP 1: Rust Tests (using pre-built image)
  # ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
  - name: 'rust:1.75-slim'
    id: 'test'
    dir: 'media-edge'
    entrypoint: 'sh'
    args:
      - '-c'
      - |
        apt-get update && apt-get install -y pkg-config libssl-dev
        cargo test --release
        cargo clippy -- -D warnings

  # ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
  # STEP 2: Build Docker image (multi-stage Rust)
  # ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
  - name: 'gcr.io/cloud-builders/docker'
    id: 'build'
    dir: 'media-edge'
    args:
      - 'build'
      - '-t'
      - 'us-central1-docker.pkg.dev/$PROJECT_ID/pnkln/media-edge:$SHORT_SHA'
      - '-t'
      - 'us-central1-docker.pkg.dev/$PROJECT_ID/pnkln/media-edge:$BRANCH_NAME'
      - '-t'
      - 'us-central1-docker.pkg.dev/$PROJECT_ID/pnkln/media-edge:latest'
      - '--cache-from'
      - 'us-central1-docker.pkg.dev/$PROJECT_ID/pnkln/media-edge:latest'
      - '--build-arg'
      - 'BUILDKIT_INLINE_CACHE=1'
      - '.'
    waitFor: ['test']

  # ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
  # STEP 3: Vulnerability Scan
  # ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
  - name: 'gcr.io/cloud-builders/gcloud'
    id: 'scan'
    args:
      - 'container'
      - 'images'
      - 'scan'
      - 'us-central1-docker.pkg.dev/$PROJECT_ID/pnkln/media-edge:$SHORT_SHA'
    waitFor: ['build']

  # ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
  # STEP 4: Push to Artifact Registry
  # ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
  - name: 'gcr.io/cloud-builders/docker'
    id: 'push'
    args:
      - 'push'
      - '--all-tags'
      - 'us-central1-docker.pkg.dev/$PROJECT_ID/pnkln/media-edge'
    waitFor: ['scan']

  # ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
  # STEP 5: Deploy via Kustomize
  # ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
  - name: 'gcr.io/cloud-builders/gke-deploy'
    id: 'deploy'
    args:
      - 'run'
      - '--filename=k8s/media-edge'
      - '--location=us-central1'
      - '--cluster=pnkln-production'
      - '--namespace=pnkln-production'
      - '--image=us-central1-docker.pkg.dev/$PROJECT_ID/pnkln/media-edge:$SHORT_SHA'
    waitFor: ['push']

  # ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
  # STEP 6: Verify Rollout
  # ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
  - name: 'gcr.io/cloud-builders/kubectl'
    id: 'verify'
    args:
      - 'rollout'
      - 'status'
      - 'deployment/media-edge'
      - '-n'
      - 'pnkln-production'
      - '--timeout=5m'
    env:
      - 'CLOUDSDK_COMPUTE_REGION=us-central1'
      - 'CLOUDSDK_CONTAINER_CLUSTER=pnkln-production'
    waitFor: ['deploy']

  # ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
  # STEP 7: Smoke Test
  # ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
  - name: 'gcr.io/cloud-builders/curl'
    id: 'smoke-test'
    args:
      - '-f'
      - 'http://media-edge.pnkln-production.svc.cluster.local/health/ready'
    waitFor: ['verify']

options:
  machineType: 'E2_HIGHCPU_32'  # Rust compilation is CPU-intensive
  logging: CLOUD_LOGGING_ONLY
  diskSizeGb: 200  # Rust target directory can be large

  env:
    - 'DOCKER_BUILDKIT=1'

timeout: '2400s'  # 40 minutes for Rust compilation

tags:
  - 'pnkln'
  - 'media-edge'
  - 'rust'
  - '$BRANCH_NAME'

images:
  - 'us-central1-docker.pkg.dev/$PROJECT_ID/pnkln/media-edge:$SHORT_SHA'
  - 'us-central1-docker.pkg.dev/$PROJECT_ID/pnkln/media-edge:$BRANCH_NAME'
  - 'us-central1-docker.pkg.dev/$PROJECT_ID/pnkln/media-edge:latest'
```

### Modification to `skaffold.yaml` (add media-edge profile)

Add a new profile section:

    activation:

---

## 5. Health Check Endpoints (Rust Implementation Notes)

The Pingora service must implement these endpoints for GCP LB compatibility:

```rust
// Required endpoints for GCP Load Balancer
GET /health/live   -> 200 OK {"status": "alive"}
GET /health/ready  -> 200 OK {"status": "ready", "cache_warm": true}
GET /metrics       -> Prometheus format (port 9090)
```

Key compatibility requirements:
- **Response time**: < 3 seconds (matches BackendConfig timeout)
- **Content-Type**: `application/json` for health, `text/plain` for metrics
- **Ready vs Live**: Ready should return 503 if cache is cold or upstream unreachable

---

## 6. Service Mesh Considerations

### Option A: No Service Mesh (Recommended for Initial Deployment)

Given the existing infrastructure uses:
- GCE Ingress (not Istio Gateway)
- Network Endpoint Groups (NEG)
- Cloud Armor security policies

A service mesh is **not required** for the initial deployment. GCP's native load balancing with NEGs provides:
- Automatic health checking
- Connection draining
- Cloud CDN integration

### Option B: Future Istio Integration (If Needed)

If adopting service mesh later, add these annotations to the deployment:

```yaml
metadata:
  annotations:
    sidecar.istio.io/inject: "true"
    traffic.sidecar.istio.io/excludeInboundPorts: "9090"  # Metrics bypass
```

And create a VirtualService:

```yaml
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: VirtualService
metadata:
  name: media-edge
  namespace: pnkln-production
spec:
  hosts:
    - media-edge
  http:
    - match:
        - uri:
            prefix: /media/
      route:
        - destination:
            host: media-edge
            port:
              number: 80
      retries:
        attempts: 3
        perTryTimeout: 10s
```

---

## 7. Custom Metrics Setup (for HPA)

### Prometheus Metrics from Rust (port 9090)

```
# Required metrics for HPA
http_requests_total{method, path, status}
http_request_duration_seconds{method, path}
cache_hits_total
cache_misses_total
upstream_requests_total
upstream_errors_total
```

### Prometheus Adapter ConfigMap Addition

```yaml
apiVersion: v1
kind: ConfigMap
metadata:
  name: adapter-config
  namespace: monitoring
data:
  config.yaml: |
    rules:
      # Requests per second
      - seriesQuery: 'http_requests_total{namespace="pnkln-production",pod!=""}'
        resources:
          overrides:
            namespace: {resource: "namespace"}
            pod: {resource: "pod"}
        name:
          matches: "^(.*)_total$"
          as: "http_requests_per_second"
        metricsQuery: 'rate(<<.Series>>{<<.LabelMatchers>>}[2m])'

      # Cache hit ratio
      - seriesQuery: 'cache_hits_total{namespace="pnkln-production",pod!=""}'
        resources:
          overrides:
            namespace: {resource: "namespace"}
            pod: {resource: "pod"}
        name:
          as: "cache_hit_ratio"
        metricsQuery: |
          rate(cache_hits_total{<<.LabelMatchers>>}[5m]) /
          (rate(cache_hits_total{<<.LabelMatchers>>}[5m]) +
           rate(cache_misses_total{<<.LabelMatchers>>}[5m]))
```

## 9. Deployment Sequence

1. **Create Artifact Registry repository** (if not exists):
   ```bash
   gcloud artifacts repositories create pnkln --repository-format=docker --location=us-central1
   ```

2. **Deploy media-edge base manifests**:
   ```bash
   kubectl apply -k k8s/media-edge
   ```

3. **Verify service health**:
   ```bash
   kubectl get pods -n pnkln-production -l component=media-edge
   kubectl logs -n pnkln-production -l component=media-edge
   ```

4. **Apply ingress patch** (adds /media/* routing):
   ```bash
   kubectl apply -k k8s/overlays/production
   ```

5. **Validate CDN configuration**:
   ```bash
   gcloud compute backend-services describe <backend-name> --global
   ```
